basic_details.job_title: RCFL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 32 Assistant Engineer, Officer and More Posts

basic_details.short_information: Here is a quick overview of the RCF Bharti 2026 notification at a glance so candidates can check their eligibility before applying.

application_fee.details: The application fee structure for RCF Apply Online 2026 is as follows. The fee is non-refundable and must be paid online only - no cash payments are accepted. | Payment can be made through internet banking, credit card, or debit card only. Candidates are advised to verify eligibility thoroughly before paying, as the fee will not be refunded under any circumstances.

age_limit.details: The eligibility criteria for RCF Officer Recruitment 2026 vary significantly by post and grade. All qualifications must be from UGC/AICTE-recognized universities or institutions, and experience is calculated as of 01 March 2026. | Candidates must hold either a CA/CMA qualification or a full-time graduation degree in Commerce/Accounting/Finance (B.Com, BMS, BAF, BBA) along with a 2-year full-time MBA/MMS/PGDM/PGDBM with specialization in Finance. M.Com alone is not accepted. Minimum 60% in the final year of the qualifying post-graduation degree is required (55% for SC/ST). No percentage criterion applies for CA/CMA holders. Minimum 2 years of post-qualification executive-level experience in accounting, auditing, budgeting, or taxation is required. Training, internship, and articleship periods do not count toward experience. Age limit: SC/ST - 39 years; OBC (NCL) - 37 years as on 01.03.2026. | A full-time graduation degree in any discipline plus a 2-year full-time post-graduation degree/diploma/equivalent master's degree with specialization in HR/Personnel/Social Work/Welfare/Industrial Relations/Labour Studies from a UGC/AICTE institution is required. Minimum 55% for SC category candidates in the final year of the post-graduation. Additional qualification in law and proficiency in Marathi are preferred. Minimum 2 years of experience in HR departments covering labour administration, industrial relations, and grievance handling is required. Age limit: SC - 39 years as on 01.03.2026. | MBBS with completed internship and registration with the Medical Council of India or State Medical Council is mandatory. Preference is given to candidates with a Certificate Course in Industrial Health (3 months) or AFIH recognized by DGFASLI, or a 2-year recognized Diploma in Anaesthesiology. Minimum 2 years of experience (excluding internship) in a hospital of 25 beds or more is required. Age limit: OBC (NCL) - 37 years as on 01.03.2026. | Candidates must hold either a Ph.D. in Chemistry from a UGC/AICTE-approved institution or a 4-year full-time B.E./B.Tech in Chemical Engineering/Petrochemical Engineering/Chemical Technology (minimum 60% aggregate). Preference is given to Ph.D. holders. Minimum 17 years of relevant experience in academics or research is required. Age limit: OBC (NCL) - 52 years as on 01.03.2026. | A regular full-time LLB degree or a 5-year integrated Law degree from a recognized Indian university is required, with a minimum of 60% in the final year of LLB. At least 2 years of relevant experience in PSU/Government/Autonomous Bodies/MNC/Private Organization/Law firms or practicing as an Advocate is required. Age limit: OBC (NCL) - 37 years as on 01.03.2026. | A 3-year full-time Diploma in Electrical/Allied Electrical Engineering/Technology from a UGC/AICTE institution is required, with a minimum of 60% in the final year. Sandwich-pattern diploma holders (3½ or 4 years) are also eligible. Minimum 16 years of post-diploma relevant working experience is required. Age limit: UR - 42 years; OBC (NCL) - 45 years as on 01.03.2026. | A 4-year full-time B.E./B.Tech in Electrical/Electrical and Power/Electrical Power Engineering, or a 3-year B.E./B.Tech acquired after a 3-year full-time Diploma, or a Dual/Integrated Degree in Electrical Engineering - all from UGC/AICTE institutions with minimum 60% aggregate - is required. Minimum 2 years of post-qualification field experience in HT/LT electrical equipment maintenance in fertilizer, chemical, refinery, petrochemical, cement, or power plant industries is required. Age limit: UR - 34 years; OBC (NCL) - 37 years; PwBD (UR) - 44 years; PwBD OBC (NCL) - 47 years as on 01.03.2026. One PwBD (OH - one lower limb affected) vacancy is available. | Same educational qualification as Engineer (Electrical) - minimum 60% B.E./B.Tech in Electrical Engineering from UGC/AICTE institutions. Minimum 4 years of post-qualification field experience in HT/LT electrical equipment maintenance is required. Age limit: UR - 36 years; OBC (NCL) - 39 years as on 01.03.2026. | Same educational qualification as above (B.E./B.Tech Electrical, minimum 60%) from UGC/AICTE institutions. Minimum 8 years of post-qualification field experience in HT/LT electrical equipment maintenance is required. Age limit: UR - 38 years; OBC (NCL) - 41 years as on 01.03.2026. | A 4-year full-time B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering or allied Civil specializations (Construction Engineering, Civil Technology, etc.) with minimum 60% from UGC/AICTE institutions is required. Lateral entry B.E./B.Tech after a 3-year Diploma is also eligible. Minimum 2 years of post-qualification experience in process industries such as fertilizers, chemicals, or refineries is required. Age limit: UR - 34 years as on 01.03.2026. | Same qualification as Engineer (Civil) - B.E./B.Tech Civil Engineering (60% minimum). Minimum 4 years of post-qualification experience in process industries preferably in fertilizers, chemicals, or petrochemicals is required. Age limit: UR - 36 years as on 01.03.2026. | Candidates wondering about age relaxation can note that SC/ST candidates get 5 years of relaxation and OBC (NCL) candidates get 3 years for reserved posts. PwBD (UR/EWS) candidates are eligible for up to 10 years of additional relaxation, SC/ST PwBD candidates up to 15 years, and OBC (NCL) PwBD candidates up to 13 years. Children/family members of 1984 riots victims are eligible for an additional 5 years of concession across all posts.

qualification.details: The eligibility criteria for RCF Officer Recruitment 2026 vary significantly by post and grade. All qualifications must be from UGC/AICTE-recognized universities or institutions, and experience is calculated as of 01 March 2026.

salary_details.details: RCF Ltd offers competitive pay scales as per DPE guidelines applicable to Navratna PSUs. The approximate gross monthly salary for each grade is given below, including Basic Pay, VDA (53.4%), Perks (34%), and HRA (30% for Class A cities). | Officers (Medical) at E1 Grade also receive an additional 25% Non-Practicing Allowance over and above the regular salary components. Initial pay will be fixed at the lowest of the grade scale, with no pay protection for candidates joining from other PSUs or government organizations. | Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

selection_process: The selection process for RCF Ltd 2026 differs by grade. Understanding the process in advance helps candidates prepare effectively for each stage.
For the E0 Grade (Assistant Engineer - Electrical)
selection is through a Skill Test consisting of three components: Practical Job Knowledge and Handling of Technical Equipment (70 marks)
Safety Awareness and Computer Knowledge (20 marks)
and Communication Skills (10 marks) - totalling 100 marks. Candidates must score a minimum of 60 marks (55 marks for SC/ST) to qualify. The Skill Test is of a qualifying nature.
For E1 Grade and above (all Officer
selection is through a Personal Interview. The interview carries 100 marks distributed as: Subject Knowledge (50 marks)
and General Awareness/Computer Knowledge/Additional Qualification (15 marks). Candidates must secure a minimum average of 50% marks to qualify the interview.
A waiting list is also maintained - in the ratio of 1:2 for up to 5 vacancies and 1:1 for more than 5 vacancies - valid for one year from the date of empanelment.
All outstation candidates called for Skill Test or Personal Interview are reimbursed to-and-fro III-tier AC train/bus fare from their correspondence address to the interview/test venue.
how_to_apply: RCF Apply Online 2026 is the only accepted mode of application. Physical applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. Follow these steps carefully to submit your application without errors.
Visit the official RCF website at www.rcfltd.com.
Navigate to the HR → Recruitment section on the website.
Click on the relevant post advertisement link (Advertisement No. 18032026).
Register your details including name (exactly as on Matriculation certificate), date of birth, qualification, and work experience.
Upload your recent photograph (165×125 pixels, JPG/JPEG, 20-50 KB) and signature (80×125 pixels, JPG/JPEG, 10-20 KB).
Upload scanned PDF copies of all supporting documents - age proof, educational certificates, experience documents, caste certificate (if applicable).
Pay the application fee online (₹1,000 for General/OBC/EWS; nil for SC/ST/PwBD/ExSM/Female) via internet banking, credit card, or debit card.
Review all entered details carefully before clicking the "Submit Form" button - no changes are permitted after submission.
Note down your unique Application Number generated upon successful submission.
Keep a printout of the submitted application form and the payment receipt for future reference.
For any queries related to the online form, email: [email protected]
The online registration window opens on 27 June 2026 at 8:00 AM and closes on 13 July 2026 at 5:00 PM.

content_sections.heading: RCF Recruitment 2026 - Quick Overview
content_sections.text: Here is a quick overview of the RCF Bharti 2026 notification at a glance so candidates can check their eligibility before applying.

rows.information: Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited (RCF Ltd)
Officer, Engineer, Sr. Engineer, Dy. Manager, Sr. Manager

content_sections.heading: RCF Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Important Dates
content_sections.text: The RCF Ltd Direct Recruitment 2026 notification has been officially released. Candidates interested in RCF Officer Recruitment 2026 or RCF Engineer Vacancy 2026 must note all key dates carefully, as no extensions are guaranteed. The cut-off date for determining eligibility - including age and educational qualifications - is fixed as 01 March 2026 and will remain unchanged under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: RCF Vacancy 2026 - Post-wise Vacancy Breakdown
content_sections.text: RCF Ltd has advertised a total of 32 vacancies across multiple disciplines and grade levels. The vacancy count includes backlog positions under the Special Recruitment Drive for SC and ST categories. BL = Backlog vacancy under Special Recruitment Drive. Vacancy numbers are tentative and may change at RCF Ltd's discretion.

content_sections.heading: RCF Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria - Qualification and Age Limit
content_sections.text: The eligibility criteria for RCF Officer Recruitment 2026 vary significantly by post and grade. All qualifications must be from UGC/AICTE-recognized universities or institutions, and experience is calculated as of 01 March 2026. Candidates must hold either a CA/CMA qualification or a full-time graduation degree in Commerce/Accounting/Finance (B.Com, BMS, BAF, BBA) along with a 2-year full-time MBA/MMS/PGDM/PGDBM with specialization in Finance. M.Com alone is not accepted. Minimum 60% in the final year of the qualifying post-graduation degree is required (55% for SC/ST). No percentage criterion applies for CA/CMA holders. Minimum 2 years of post-qualification executive-level experience in accounting, auditing, budgeting, or taxation is required. Training, internship, and articleship periods do not count toward experience. Age limit: SC/ST - 39 years; OBC (NCL) - 37 years as on 01.03.2026. A full-time graduation degree in any discipline plus a 2-year full-time post-graduation degree/diploma/equivalent master's degree with specialization in HR/Personnel/Social Work/Welfare/Industrial Relations/Labour Studies from a UGC/AICTE institution is required. Minimum 55% for SC category candidates in the final year of the post-graduation. Additional qualification in law and proficiency in Marathi are preferred. Minimum 2 years of experience in HR departments covering labour administration, industrial relations, and grievance handling is required. Age limit: SC - 39 years as on 01.03.2026. MBBS with completed internship and registration with the Medical Council of India or State Medical Council is mandatory. Preference is given to candidates with a Certificate Course in Industrial Health (3 months) or AFIH recognized by DGFASLI, or a 2-year recognized Diploma in Anaesthesiology. Minimum 2 years of experience (excluding internship) in a hospital of 25 beds or more is required. Age limit: OBC (NCL) - 37 years as on 01.03.2026. Candidates must hold either a Ph.D. in Chemistry from a UGC/AICTE-approved institution or a 4-year full-time B.E./B.Tech in Chemical Engineering/Petrochemical Engineering/Chemical Technology (minimum 60% aggregate). Preference is given to Ph.D. holders. Minimum 17 years of relevant experience in academics or research is required. Age limit: OBC (NCL) - 52 years as on 01.03.2026. A regular full-time LLB degree or a 5-year integrated Law degree from a recognized Indian university is required, with a minimum of 60% in the final year of LLB. At least 2 years of relevant experience in PSU/Government/Autonomous Bodies/MNC/Private Organization/Law firms or practicing as an Advocate is required. Age limit: OBC (NCL) - 37 years as on 01.03.2026. A 3-year full-time Diploma in Electrical/Allied Electrical Engineering/Technology from a UGC/AICTE institution is required, with a minimum of 60% in the final year. Sandwich-pattern diploma holders (3½ or 4 years) are also eligible. Minimum 16 years of post-diploma relevant working experience is required. A

content_sections.heading: Application Fee - RCF Direct Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The application fee structure for RCF Apply Online 2026 is as follows. The fee is non-refundable and must be paid online only - no cash payments are accepted. Payment can be made through internet banking, credit card, or debit card only. Candidates are advised to verify eligibility thoroughly before paying, as the fee will not be refunded under any circumstances.

content_sections.heading: Selection Process - RCF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: The selection process for RCF Ltd 2026 differs by grade. Understanding the process in advance helps candidates prepare effectively for each stage. For the E0 Grade (Assistant Engineer - Electrical), selection is through a Skill Test consisting of three components: Practical Job Knowledge and Handling of Technical Equipment (70 marks), Safety Awareness and Computer Knowledge (20 marks), and Communication Skills (10 marks) - totalling 100 marks. Candidates must score a minimum of 60 marks (55 marks for SC/ST) to qualify. The Skill Test is of a qualifying nature. For E1 Grade and above (all Officer, Engineer, Senior Engineer, Deputy Manager, and Senior Manager posts), selection is through a Personal Interview. The interview carries 100 marks distributed as: Subject Knowledge (50 marks), Nature of Experience (20 marks), Personality and Communication Skills (15 marks), and General Awareness/Computer Knowledge/Additional Qualification (15 marks). Candidates must secure a minimum average of 50% marks to qualify the interview. A waiting list is also maintained - in the ratio of 1:2 for up to 5 vacancies and 1:1 for more than 5 vacancies - valid for one year from the date of empanelment. All outstation candidates called for Skill Test or Personal Interview are reimbursed to-and-fro III-tier AC train/bus fare from their correspondence address to the interview/test venue.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for RCF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: RCF Apply Online 2026 is the only accepted mode of application. Physical applications will not be accepted under any circumstances. Follow these steps carefully to submit your application without errors. The online registration window opens on 27 June 2026 at 8:00 AM and closes on 13 July 2026 at 5:00 PM . Direct Link to Apply Online

content_sections.heading: RCF Recruitment 2026 Apply Online
content_sections.text: Candidates are advised to complete the registration well before the last date to avoid any technical issues due to high website traffic near the deadline. The application is considered complete only after successful fee payment (where applicable) and upload of photograph and signature.

content_sections.heading: Salary and Pay Scale - RCF 2026
content_sections.text: RCF Ltd offers competitive pay scales as per DPE guidelines applicable to Navratna PSUs. The approximate gross monthly salary for each grade is given below, including Basic Pay, VDA (53.4%), Perks (34%), and HRA (30% for Class A cities). Officers (Medical) at E1 Grade also receive an additional 25% Non-Practicing Allowance over and above the regular salary components. Initial pay will be fixed at the lowest of the grade scale, with no pay protection for candidates joining from other PSUs or government organizations. Calculate your exact in-hand Salary in 10 seconds - Calculate Now

content_sections.heading: Common Mistakes to Avoid - RCF Bharti 2026
content_sections.text: Many candidates lose their eligibility due to avoidable errors in the application process. The following original guidance is based on common pitfalls in PSU recruitment applications. Uploading documents in wrong formats is one of the most common rejection reasons - ensure photographs are in JPG/JPEG at 165×125 pixels and all supporting documents are in PDF format. Candidates often assume M.Com qualifies for the Finance Officer post - the notification explicitly states M.Com is not accepted; an MBA/MMS/PGDM with Finance specialization is mandatory. Failing to convert CGPA to percentage before submission causes frequent rejections; contact your university for the official conversion formula and attach a copy at interview. OBC candidates whose most recent Non-Creamy Layer certificate was issued before 1 April 2025 will not be accepted - the notification specifically requires a certificate issued on or after 1 April 2025. Counting internship, articleship, or training periods as work experience is not permitted - only post-qualification executive experience counts. Name mismatches between the application and photo identity proof result in disqualification from the Skill Test or Interview - use your name exactly as it appears on your Matriculation certificate. Government-employed candidates must carry a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their present employer at the time of interview or their candidature will be rejected.

faq.question: Q1. Has RCF officially released the Direct Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: Yes. Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers Limited has officially released the RCF Recruitment 2026 notification under Advertisement No. 18032026, inviting applications for 32 vacancies across Officer, Engineer, Senior Engineer, Deputy Manager, and Senior Manager posts.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for RCF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 13 July 2026 at 5:00 PM. The online registration window opens on 27 June 2026 at 8:00 AM.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for RCF Bharti 2026?
faq.answer: General, OBC (NCL), and EWS candidates must pay ₹1,000 plus bank charges and GST. SC, ST, PwBD, ExSM, and Female candidates are fully exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q4. How many total vacancies are there in RCF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: RCF Ltd has advertised a total of 32 vacancies across 11 post categories, including backlog vacancies under the Special Recruitment Drive for SC and ST candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for RCF Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For E0 grade (Assistant Engineer – Electrical), selection is through a qualifying Skill Test. For all E1 grade and above posts — including all Officer, Engineer, Deputy Manager, and Senior Manager posts — selection is through a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q6. Is M.Com degree acceptable for the Officer (Finance) post?
faq.answer: No. The RCF notification explicitly states that M.Com qualification will not be considered for the Officer (Finance) post. Candidates must hold CA/CMA or an MBA/MMS/PGDM with Finance specialization.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for RCF Engineer posts?
faq.answer: Engineers at E1 grade receive a pay scale of ₹40,000–₹1,40,000 with an approximate gross monthly salary of ₹86,960. Senior Engineers at E2 grade receive ₹50,000–₹1,60,000 with approximately ₹1,08,700 per month.

faq.question: Q8. Where will selected candidates be posted?
faq.answer: Selected candidates may be posted at any of RCF's units — Trombay (Mumbai) or Thal (Raigad) — or at area offices or marketing offices anywhere across India, including project sites, as decided by management. The job includes shift operations.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for RCF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official website is www.rcfltd.com. All recruitment-related updates, corrigenda, and call letters will be published under the HR→Recruitment section of this website only.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates currently employed in government or PSU organizations apply?
faq.answer: Yes, but they must either forward their application through the proper channel or produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their present employer at the time of interview or Skill Test. Failure to produce an NOC will result in rejection of candidature.
